case_title: COLLEEN BOODLEMAN VS. CAL PROPERTIES WOMAN'S DIV. ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,540.00 FILED BY BOODLEMAN, COLLEEN AS TO DEFENDANT CAL PROPERTIES WOMAN'S DIV. KAIRY, TANQUIESHA ZANGHI, JOHN D ROBERTS, DION DIRECTOR, MARY ELIZABETH INN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-27-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO FEE: IFP) SERVED JAN-12-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KAIRY, TANQUIESHA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-09-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CAL PROPERTIES WOMAN'S DIV.
REMARK: RETURN MAIL RE: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT - UNABLE TO FORWARD
COPYING FEES (6 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF BOODLEMAN, COLLEEN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO FEE: IFP) SERVED JAN-26-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ZANGHI, JOHN D
COPYING FEES (1 PAGE, 1 CERTIFIED COPY) PROOF OF RETURNED MAIL--FILED ON JAN-25-2017-- PAID BY PLAINTIFF BOODLEMAN, COLLEEN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-27-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-27-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF COLLEN BOODLEMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CAL PROPERTIES WOMAN'S DVI IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY DION ROBERTS, PROPERTY MANAGER. DEFENDANTS TANQUIESHA KAIRY, JOHN ZANGHI AND DION ROBERTS, DIRECTOR MARY ELIZABETH INN ARE PRESENT. PLAINTIIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOODLEMAN, COLLEEN ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
COPYING FEES (24 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF BOODLEMAN, COLLEEN
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CAL PROPERTIES WOMAN'S DIV.
COPYING FEES (4 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF BOODLEMAN, COLLEEN
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (SERVED OUT OF STATE TO NEW YORK: CASE INVOLVES MONEY RENT) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOODLEMAN, COLLEEN AS TO DEFENDANT CAL PROPERTIES WOMAN'S DIV.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-27-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOODLEMAN, COLLEEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT KAIRY, TANQUIESHA ZANGHI, JOHN D ROBERTS, DION DIRECTOR, MARY ELIZABETH INN MARY ELIZABETH INN ALL PARTIES AGREE TO DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE CAL PROPERTIES WOMAN'S DIV. AND AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO INCLUDE MARY ELIZABETH INN AS AN ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT WHO WAIVES SERVICE, NOTICE AND ALL IRREGULARITIES. PLAINTIFF'S EVIDENCE DOES NOT SUPPORT HER CLAIMS OF BREACH OF CONTRACT, UNINHABITABILITY, NEGLIGENCE, HARASSMENT, DISCRIMINATION, ILLEGAL ENTRY, OR OTHERWISE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF BOODLEMAN, COLLEEN ADDITIONAL DEFENDANT EXHIBITS
